problem_text_cn:
## 六、(28分)
惯性系S的 $O x_0 y_0$ 平面内，有三个质量分别为 $m_1=m$，$m_2=2m$，$m_3=3m$ 的质点 $P_1$，$P_2$，$P_3$，$t=0$ 时刻的位置、速度已在图中示出。$P_1$，$P_2$，$P_3$ 间存在距离一次方的引力，即质量分别为 $m_1$，$m_2$ 的两个质点相距 $r$ 时，其间引力大小可表述为
$$ F=G^* m_1 m_2 r,\quad G^*>0, $$
设无外力存在。
(1) 在 $\{P_1，P_2，P_3\}$ 系统的质心参考系中，以质心所在位置为原点，设置分别与 $x_0$ 轴、$y_0$ 轴平行的 $x$ 轴、$y$ 轴。先不考虑相互碰撞的可能性，导出 $P_1$，$P_2$，$P_3$ 在 $xy$ 平面内的运动方程，即 $x_i=x_i(t)$、$y_i=y_i(t)$，$i=1,2,3$；画出运动轨道。
(2) 假设质点间可能发生的碰撞都是弹性的，如果某时刻两个质点相遇时，其一速度不为零，其二速度恰好降为零，则设定必发生弹性正碰撞（碰撞前后速度矢量在同一直线上的碰撞称为正碰撞）。
(2.1) 试求 $\{P_1，P_2，P_3\}$ 系统的运动周期 $T$（题文、题图所给均为已知量）；
(2.2) 设置 3 幅 $xy$ 坐标平面，分别为 $P_1$，$P_2$，$P_3$ 单独画出在 $t=0$ 到 $t=T$ 时间段内的运动轨道，标出轨道中各小段运动方向，注上各个特征点的 $x$，$y$ 坐标量。
problem_text_en:
## Six. (28 points)
In the $O x_0 y_0$ plane of inertial frame S, there are three particles $P_1$, $P_2$, $P_3$ with masses $m_1=m$, $m_2=2m$, $m_3=3m$. Their positions and velocities at $t=0$ are shown in the figure. The attractive force between any two particles is proportional to their distance, i.e., for particles of masses $m_1$ and $m_2$ separated by $r$, the magnitude of the force is
$$ F=G^* m_1 m_2 r,\quad G^*>0, $$
and no external forces are present.
(1) In the center‑of‑mass frame of the system $\{P_1,P_2,P_3\}$, with the center of mass as the origin, set up $x$‑ and $y$‑axes parallel to the $x_0$‑ and $y_0$‑axes, respectively. Neglecting the possibility of collisions, derive the equations of motion of $P_1$, $P_2$, $P_3$ in the $xy$ plane, i.e., $x_i=x_i(t)$, $y_i=y_i(t)$ for $i=1,2,3$; draw the trajectories.
(2) Assume that any collisions that may occur are elastic. If at the instant two particles meet, one has a non‑zero velocity and the other happens to have zero velocity, it is stipulated that a head‑on elastic collision must occur (a collision in which the velocity vectors before and after lie on the same line is called a head‑on collision).
(2.1) Find the motion period $T$ of the system $\{P_1,P_2,P_3\}$ (all quantities given in the problem statement and figure are known).
(2.2) Provide three separate $xy$ coordinate planes, one for each of $P_1$, $P_2$, $P_3$, and draw the trajectory of each particle from $t=0$ to $t=T$. Mark the direction of motion along each segment and annotate the $x$, $y$ coordinates of the characteristic points.
problem_solution_cn:
【参考解答】
(1) S 系中质心 C 的速度 $v_C$：沿 $y_0$ 轴方向，$v_C=v_0$。
建立质心参考系，$P_1$，$P_2$，$P_3$ 在 $t=0$ 时刻的位置和速度如题解图 1 所示。$t \ge 0$ 时刻，将 $P_1$，$P_2$，$P_3$ 在 $xy$ 平面上的位置矢量分别记为 $\mathbf{r}_1$，$\mathbf{r}_2$，$\mathbf{r}_3$，各自受力分别为
$$ \begin{aligned}
\mathbf{F}_1 &= G^* m_1 m_2 (\mathbf{r}_2-\mathbf{r}_1)+G^* m_1 m_3 (\mathbf{r}_3-\mathbf{r}_1) \\
&= G^* m_1 (m_2+m_3) \mathbf{r}_C - G^* m_1 (m_1+m_2+m_3) \mathbf{r}_1 \quad (\mathbf{r}_C=0) \\
&= -G^* m_1 (m_1+m_2+m_3) \mathbf{r}_1, \\
\mathbf{F}_2 &= G^* m_2 m_3 (\mathbf{r}_3-\mathbf{r}_2)+G^* m_2 m_1 (\mathbf{r}_1-\mathbf{r}_2) \\
&= -G^* m_2 (m_1+m_2+m_3) \mathbf{r}_2, \\
\mathbf{F}_3 &= G^* m_3 m_1 (\mathbf{r}_1-\mathbf{r}_3)+G^* m_3 m_2 (\mathbf{r}_2-\mathbf{r}_3) \\
&= -G^* m_3 (m_1+m_2+m_3) \mathbf{r}_3,
\end{aligned} $$
可统一表述为
$$ \mathbf{F}_i = -G^* m_i (m_1+m_2+m_3) \mathbf{r}_i,\quad i=1,2,3. \qquad(5\text{分}) $$
这是以质心 C 为力心的吸引性线性有心力。各质点沿 $x$，$y$ 轴方向的动力学方程为
$$ m_i \ddot{x}_i = F_{ix} = -G^* (m_1+m_2+m_3) m_i x_i,\quad \Rightarrow \quad \ddot{x}_i + G^* (m_1+m_2+m_3) x_i = 0, \qquad(1\text{分}) $$
$$ m_i \ddot{y}_i = F_{iy} = -G^* (m_1+m_2+m_3) m_i y_i,\quad \Rightarrow \quad \ddot{y}_i + G^* (m_1+m_2+m_3) y_i = 0. \qquad(1\text{分}) $$
可得简谐振动解：
$$ x_i = A_{ix} \cos(\omega t+\phi_{ix}),\quad y_i = A_{iy} \cos(\omega t+\phi_{iy}),\quad \omega = \sqrt{G^* (m_1+m_2+m_3)} = \sqrt{6G^* m}. \qquad(2\text{分}) $$
对 $P_1$，由初条件
$$ t=0 \text{ 时 }\begin{cases} x_{10}=3a, \\ y_{10}=0, \end{cases}\quad \begin{cases} v_{10,x}=0, \\ v_{10,y}=2v_0, \end{cases} $$
得 $A_{1x}=3a$，$\phi_{1x}=0$；$A_{1y}=2v_0/\omega$，$\phi_{1y}=-\pi/2$，
$$ \Rightarrow x_1=3a\cos\omega t,\quad y_1=\frac{2v_0}{\omega}\sin\omega t. \qquad(1\text{分}) $$
对 $P_2$，由初条件
$$ t=0 \text{ 时 }\begin{cases} x_{20}=0, \\ y_{20}=0, \end{cases}\quad \begin{cases} v_{20,x}=0, \\ v_{20,y}=-v_0, \end{cases} $$
得 $A_{2x}=0$，$A_{2y}=v_0/\omega$，$\phi_{2y}=-\pi/2$，
$$ \Rightarrow x_2=0,\quad y_2=-\frac{v_0}{\omega}\sin\omega t. \qquad(1\text{分}) $$
对 $P_3$，由初条件
$$ t=0 \text{ 时 }\begin{cases} x_{30}=-a, \\ y_{30}=0, \end{cases}\quad \begin{cases} v_{30,x}=0, \\ v_{30,y}=2v_0, \end{cases} $$
得 $A_{3x}=a$，$\phi_{3x}=\pi$；$A_{3y}=2v_0/\omega$，$\phi_{3y}=-\pi/2$，
$$ \Rightarrow x_3=-a\cos\omega t,\quad y_3=\frac{2v_0}{\omega}\sin\omega t. \qquad(1\text{分}) $$
不考虑碰撞，$P_1$ 和 $P_3$ 的运动轨道都是椭圆，$P_2$ 的运动轨道是直线段，如题解图 2 所示。轨道的运动周期同为
$$ T_0 = \frac{2\pi}{\omega} = \frac{2\pi}{\sqrt{6G^* m}}. $$

(2) 由题解图 2 可见，在 $t_1=T_0/4$ 时刻，$P_1$，$P_2$ 在 $x=0$，$y=2v_0/\omega$ 处发生碰撞，是一个运动质点 $P_1$ 与另一个静止质点 $P_2$ 的碰撞，按题文所设，是弹性正碰撞。碰前，$P_1$ 沿 $x$ 轴速度为 $u_0=-\omega\cdot 3a$。碰后 $P_1$，$P_2$ 沿 $x$ 轴方向速度分别可解（过程略）得为
$$ u_1=\omega a\;(P_1\text{ 沿 }x\text{ 轴正方向运动}),\quad u_2=-\omega\cdot 2a\;(P_2\text{ 沿 }x\text{ 轴负方向运动}). $$
而后，$P_1$，$P_2$ 沿 $y$ 轴方向的简谐振动不变，沿 $x$ 轴方向简谐振动的振幅将分别改取为 $P_1:\;A_{1x}'=a$，$P_2:\;A_{2x}'=2a$。于是，
在第 1 个 $T_0/4$（即 $t=0$ 到 $t_1=T_0/4$）时间段内，$P_1$，$P_2$，$P_3$ 运动轨道如题解图 3 所示；
在第 2 个 $T_0/4$（即 $t_1$ 到 $t_2=2t_1$）时间段内，$P_1$，$P_2$，$P_3$ 运动轨道如题解图 4 所示。
由题解图 4 可见，在 $t_2=2t_1$ 时刻，$P_1$，$P_3$ 在 $x=a$，$y=0$ 处碰撞，碰前 $P_1$ 沿 $y$ 轴速度 $u_{10}=-2v_0$，$P_3$ 沿 $y$ 轴速度 $u_{30}=2v_0$。碰后，$P_1$，$P_3$ 沿 $y$ 轴方向速度分别可解（过程略）得为
$$ u_1=4v_0\;(P_1\text{ 沿 }y\text{ 轴正方向运动}),\quad u_3=0\;(P_3\text{ 沿 }y\text{ 轴方向不运动}). $$
而后，$P_1$，$P_3$ 沿 $x$ 轴方向的简谐振动不变，沿 $y$ 轴方向 $P_3$ 不运动，$P_1$ 振幅为 $A_{1y}'=4v_0/\omega$。于是，
在第 3 个 $T_0/4$（$t_2$ 到 $t_3=3t_1$）时间段内，$P_1$，$P_2$，$P_3$ 运动轨道如题解图 5 所示；
在第 4 个 $T_0/4$（$t_3$ 到 $t_4=4t_1$）时间段内，$P_1$，$P_2$，$P_3$ 运动轨道如题解图 6 所示。
由题解图 6 可见，在 $t_4=4t_1$ 时刻，$P_1$，$P_3$ 在 $x=-a$，$y=0$ 处再次碰撞，与 $t_2=2t_1$ 时刻的碰撞有正、逆关系，故碰后 $P_1$，$P_3$ 沿 $y$ 轴方向速度分别对应为
$$ u_1=2v_0\;(P_1\text{ 沿 }y\text{ 轴正方向运动}),\quad u_3=-2v_0\;(P_3\text{ 沿 }y\text{ 轴负方向运动}). $$
于是，
在第 5 个 $T_0/4$（$t_4$ 到 $t_5=5t_1$）时间段内，$P_1$，$P_2$，$P_3$ 运动轨道如题解图 7 所示；
在第 6 个 $T_0/4$（$t_4$ 到 $t_6=6t_1$）时间段内，$P_1$，$P_2$，$P_3$ 运动轨道如题解图 8 所示。
由题解图 7 可见，在 $t_5=5t_1$ 时刻，$P_1$，$P_2$ 在 $x=0$，$y=2v_0/\omega$ 处碰撞，与 $t_1=T_0/4$ 时刻的碰撞有正、逆关系，故碰后 $P_1$，$P_2$ 沿 $x$ 轴方向速度分别为
$$ u_1=-\omega\cdot 3a\;(P_1\text{ 沿 }x\text{ 轴负方向运动}),\quad u_2=0\;(P_2\text{ 沿 }x\text{ 轴方向不运动}). $$
题解图 8 中，在 $t_6=6t_1$ 时刻 $P_1$，$P_2$，$P_3$ 的位置和速度与题解图 1 中 $t=0$ 时刻 $P_1$，$P_2$，$P_3$ 的位置和速度之间的关系，恰好为 $x\to -x$，$y\to -y$ 的变换。故再经过 $\Delta t=6t_1$ 时间间隔，即到达 $t_{12}=12t_1$ 时刻，又发生一次 $x\to -x$，$y\to -y$ 的变换，使 $\{P_1，P_2，P_3\}$ 系统运动状态复原。
因此，系统的运动周期为 $T=12t_1=3T_0=\frac{6\pi}{\sqrt{6G^* m}}$。（$2$ 分）
(2.2) 各质点的分段运动轨迹图见题解图 9、10、11。（2 分）
problem_solution_en:
[Reference solution]
(1) The velocity of the center of mass C in frame S: along the $y_0$‑axis, $v_C=v_0$.
In the center‑of‑mass frame, the positions and velocities of $P_1$, $P_2$, $P_3$ at $t=0$ are as shown in solution diagram 1. For $t\ge0$, denote the position vectors of the three particles in the $xy$ plane as $\mathbf{r}_1$, $\mathbf{r}_2$, $\mathbf{r}_3$. The forces on them are
$$ \begin{aligned}
\mathbf{F}_1 &= G^* m_1 m_2 (\mathbf{r}_2-\mathbf{r}_1)+G^* m_1 m_3 (\mathbf{r}_3-\mathbf{r}_1) \\
&= -G^* m_1 (m_1+m_2+m_3) \mathbf{r}_1, \\
\mathbf{F}_2 &= G^* m_2 m_3 (\mathbf{r}_3-\mathbf{r}_2)+G^* m_2 m_1 (\mathbf{r}_1-\mathbf{r}_2) \\
&= -G^* m_2 (m_1+m_2+m_3) \mathbf{r}_2, \\
\mathbf{F}_3 &= G^* m_3 m_1 (\mathbf{r}_1-\mathbf{r}_3)+G^* m_3 m_2 (\mathbf{r}_2-\mathbf{r}_3) \\
&= -G^* m_3 (m_1+m_2+m_3) \mathbf{r}_3,
\end{aligned} $$
which can be unified as
$$ \mathbf{F}_i = -G^* m_i (m_1+m_2+m_3) \mathbf{r}_i,\quad i=1,2,3. \qquad(5\text{ pts}) $$
This is an attractive linear central force with the center of mass C as the force center. The equations of motion along the $x$‑ and $y$‑axes are
$$ \ddot{x}_i + G^* (m_1+m_2+m_3) x_i = 0,\qquad \ddot{y}_i + G^* (m_1+m_2+m_3) y_i = 0. \qquad(2\text{ pts}) $$
The harmonic‑oscillation solutions are
$$ x_i = A_{ix} \cos(\omega t+\phi_{ix}),\quad y_i = A_{iy} \cos(\omega t+\phi_{iy}),\quad \omega = \sqrt{G^* (m_1+m_2+m_3)} = \sqrt{6G^* m}. \qquad(2\text{ pts}) $$
For $P_1$, using initial conditions
$$ t=0:\; x_{10}=3a,\; y_{10}=0,\; v_{10,x}=0,\; v_{10,y}=2v_0, $$
we get $A_{1x}=3a$, $\phi_{1x}=0$; $A_{1y}=2v_0/\omega$, $\phi_{1y}=-\pi/2$,
$$ x_1=3a\cos\omega t,\quad y_1=\frac{2v_0}{\omega}\sin\omega t. \qquad(1\text{ pt}) $$
For $P_2$, initial conditions
$$ t=0:\; x_{20}=0,\; y_{20}=0,\; v_{20,x}=0,\; v_{20,y}=-v_0, $$
give $A_{2x}=0$, $A_{2y}=v_0/\omega$, $\phi_{2y}=-\pi/2$,
$$ x_2=0,\quad y_2=-\frac{v_0}{\omega}\sin\omega t. \qquad(1\text{ pt}) $$
For $P_3$, initial conditions
$$ t=0:\; x_{30}=-a,\; y_{30}=0,\; v_{30,x}=0,\; v_{30,y}=2v_0, $$
give $A_{3x}=a$, $\phi_{3x}=\pi$; $A_{3y}=2v_0/\omega$, $\phi_{3y}=-\pi/2$,
$$ x_3=-a\cos\omega t,\quad y_3=\frac{2v_0}{\omega}\sin\omega t. \qquad(1\text{ pt}) $$
Ignoring collisions, the trajectories of $P_1$ and $P_3$ are ellipses, and that of $P_2$ is a straight segment, as shown in solution diagram 2. The common period of the orbits is
$$ T_0 = \frac{2\pi}{\omega} = \frac{2\pi}{\sqrt{6G^* m}}. $$

(2) From solution diagram 2, at $t_1=T_0/4$, $P_1$ and $P_2$ collide at $x=0$, $y=2v_0/\omega$. This is a collision between a moving particle $P_1$ and a stationary particle $P_2$; according to the problem statement it is an elastic head‑on collision. Before collision, the $x$‑component of $P_1$’s velocity is $u_0=-\omega\cdot 3a$. After collision, the $x$‑components (derivation omitted) are
$$ u_1=\omega a\;(P_1\text{ moves in }+x\text{ direction}),\quad u_2=-\omega\cdot 2a\;(P_2\text{ moves in }-x\text{ direction}). $$
Thereafter, the $y$‑direction harmonic motions of $P_1$ and $P_2$ remain unchanged, but the amplitudes of the $x$‑direction harmonic motions become $A_{1x}'=a$ for $P_1$ and $A_{2x}'=2a$ for $P_2$. Consequently,
in the first quarter‑period $t=0$ to $t_1=T_0/4$, the trajectories are as shown in solution diagram 3;
in the second quarter‑period $t_1$ to $t_2=2t_1$, the trajectories are as shown in solution diagram 4.
From solution diagram 4, at $t_2=2t_1$, $P_1$ and $P_3$ collide at $x=a$, $y=0$. Before collision, the $y$‑components are $u_{10}=-2v_0$ for $P_1$ and $u_{30}=2v_0$ for $P_3$. After collision,
$$ u_1=4v_0\;(P_1\text{ moves in }+y\text{ direction}),\quad u_3=0\;(P_3\text{ has no motion in }y\text{ direction}). $$
Thereafter, the $x$‑direction harmonic motions of $P_1$ and $P_3$ remain unchanged; in the $y$‑direction $P_3$ does not move, and the amplitude for $P_1$ becomes $A_{1y}'=4v_0/\omega$. Hence,
in the third quarter‑period $t_2$ to $t_3=3t_1$, trajectories are as shown in solution diagram 5;
in the fourth quarter‑period $t_3$ to $t_4=4t_1$, trajectories are as shown in solution diagram 6.
From solution diagram 6, at $t_4=4t_1$, $P_1$ and $P_3$ collide again at $x=-a$, $y=0$. This collision is the inverse of the one at $t_2$, so after collision the $y$‑components are
$$ u_1=2v_0\;(P_1\text{ moves in }+y\text{ direction}),\quad u_3=-2v_0\;(P_3\text{ moves in }-y\text{ direction}). $$
Consequently,
in the fifth quarter‑period $t_4$ to $t_5=5t_1$, trajectories are as shown in solution diagram 7;
in the sixth quarter‑period $t_4$ to $t_6=6t_1$, trajectories are as shown in solution diagram 8.
From solution diagram 7, at $t_5=5t_1$, $P_1$ and $P_2$ collide at $x=0$, $y=2v_0/\omega$, which is the inverse of the collision at $t_1$. After collision,
$$ u_1=-\omega\cdot 3a\;(P_1\text{ moves in }-x\text{ direction}),\quad u_2=0\;(P_2\text{ has no motion in }x\text{ direction}). $$
In solution diagram 8, at $t_6=6t_1$ the positions and velocities of $P_1$, $P_2$, $P_3$ are related to those at $t=0$ in solution diagram 1 by the transformation $x\to -x$, $y\to -y$. After another $\Delta t=6t_1$, i.e. at $t_{12}=12t_1$, the same transformation occurs again, restoring the original state of the system.
Therefore, the period of the system is $T=12t_1=3T_0=\dfrac{6\pi}{\sqrt{6G^* m}}$. (2 pts)
(2.2) The segmented trajectories of the particles are shown in solution diagrams 9, 10, 11. (2 pts)
img_cn: 题图：在惯性系S的Ox₀y₀平面内，三个质点P₁(m)、P₂(2m)、P₃(3m)的初始位置与速度。x₀轴水平，y₀轴竖直。P₁位于(-a,0)，速度-v₀沿y₀轴负向；P₂位于(0,0)，静止；P₃位于(3a,0)，速度3v₀沿y₀轴正向。图中标有'S系'，并注明力为距离一次方引力F=G*mᵢ*mⱼ*r。

题解图1：质心参考系中t=0时刻三个质点的位置与速度。坐标轴为x、y。P₁(3a,0)，速度2v₀沿y轴正向；P₂(0,0)，速度-v₀沿y轴负向；P₃(-a,0)，速度2v₀沿y轴正向。图中标注了各质点质量。

 题解图2：不考虑碰撞时三个质点的运动轨道。P₁和P₃的轨迹为椭圆，P₂的轨迹为沿y轴的直线段。图中显示了轨道形状及特征点坐标，如P₁的椭圆长轴沿x轴，半长轴3a，半短轴2v₀/ω。

题解图3、4、5、6、7、8展示了考虑碰撞后，六个四分之一周期内三个质点的运动轨迹。每个图显示了该时间段内P₁、P₂、P₃在xy平面的运动路径，用带箭头的曲线或直线段表示，并标注了碰撞点坐标及各分段运动方向。

 题解图9、10、11分别为P₁、P₂、P₃在t=0到t=T时间段内的分段运动轨道合成图，每个图中用数字1-12标记了运动顺序，箭头指示方向，并注明了各特征点的x、y坐标。
img_en: Problem figure: In the Ox₀y₀ plane of inertial frame S, initial positions and velocities of three particles P₁(m), P₂(2m), P₃(3m). x₀‑axis horizontal, y₀‑axis vertical. P₁ at (-a,0) with velocity -v₀ along negative y₀‑axis; P₂ at (0,0) at rest; P₃ at (3a,0) with velocity 3v₀ along positive y₀‑axis. The figure is labeled 'S系' and notes the force is a linear‑distance attraction F=G*mᵢ*mⱼ*r.

Solution diagram 1: Positions and velocities of the three particles at t=0 in the center‑of‑mass frame. Axes are x and y. P₁ at (3a,0) with velocity 2v₀ along +y; P₂ at (0,0) with velocity -v₀ along -y; P₃ at (-a,0) with velocity 2v₀ along +y. The masses are indicated.

Solution diagram 2: Trajectories of the three particles if collisions are ignored. P₁ and P₃ follow elliptical paths, P₂ moves along a straight segment on the y‑axis. The diagram shows the shapes and characteristic coordinates, e.g., P₁’s ellipse has semi‑major axis 3a along x and semi‑minor axis 2v₀/ω.

Solution diagrams 3,4,5,6,7,8 show the trajectories of the three particles in six consecutive quarter‑periods when collisions are taken into account. Each diagram depicts the motion paths in the xy plane using arrows, marking collision‑point coordinates and direction of motion for each segment.

Solution diagrams 9,10,11 are composite diagrams showing the segmented trajectories of P₁, P₂, P₃ respectively from t=0 to t=T. Numbers 1‑12 indicate the sequence, arrows show direction, and the x,y coordinates of characteristic points are annotated.
